name: Claude Opus 5
description: Claude Opus 5 is Anthropic's forthcoming Opus model. This coming-soon entry stages the model for Anthropic, Google Vertex AI, and Amazon Bedrock while release metadata and pricing remain unconfirmed.

details.name: availability_note
details.value: Coming-soon catalog entry; provider mappings are staged as inactive and pricing is intentionally unset until Anthropic confirms the release.
